zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Sophia Kennedy於1513年1月11日出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾巴甘尼時，她的父親Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Bargany22歲，母親Mariot Dunbar of Mochrum11510歲。她於1529年與Sir William Wallace 17th of Riccarton在蘇格蘭艾斯爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1597年1月12日在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安享年84歲，埋葬在土耳其特拉布宗本。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Sophia Kennedy于1513年1月11日出生在苏格兰艾斯爾巴甘尼时，她的父亲Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Bargany22岁，母亲Mariot Dunbar of Mochrum11510岁。她于1529年与Sir William Wallace 17th of Riccarton在苏格兰艾斯爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1597年1月12日在苏格兰米德洛迪安享年84岁，埋葬在土耳其特拉布宗本。

nameMeanings.name: Kennedy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Ceannéidigh ‘descendant of Ceannéidigh’ (from ceann ‘head’ + éidigh ‘ugly’); or from the Scottish Gaelic Mac Cinnèidigh, consisting of mac ‘son’ with an equivalent name. Compare Canaday , Cannady , Cannedy , Kannady , and Kenedy .

History: Kennedy ancestral lands are found both in Ireland and in Scotland, where the family's medieval ancestral seat is sited on the Ayrshire coast, facing the Irish Sea. — The great-grandparents of President John Fitzgerald Kennedy (1917–63) came to North America as immigrants from Ireland in the 1840s. His paternal great-grandparents were Patrick Kennedy (1823–58), born in Dunganstown, County Wexford, Ireland, and Bridget Murphy, who was born probably in Owenduff, County Wexford, Ireland c. 1827; they came to Boston, MA, in 1849. His maternal great-grandparents were Thomas Fitzgerald (1823–85), who was born in Bruff, County Limerick, Ireland, and Rose Anna Cox, who was born probably in Tomregan or Kinawley, County Cavan, Ireland, c. 1835; they came to Boston, MA, in 1857. — An early Scottish Kennedy forebear of a quite different family was British colonial official Archibald Kennedy (1685–1763), the son of Alexander Kennedy of Craigoch, who emigrated to NY c. 1710.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

nameMeanings.name: Sophia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek word meaning ‘wisdom’. The Eastern cult of  St Sophia  arose as a result of misinterpretation of the phrase Hagia Sophia ‘holy wisdom’ as if it meant ‘St Sophia’. The name became popular in England in the 17th and 18th centuries—the heroine of  Fielding's  novel Tom Jones (  1749 ) is called  Sophia Weston—and  has been increasing in popularity since the 1990s. In Scotland it has been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Beathag .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Sophia Kennedy was born on 11 January 1513, in Bargany, Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Bargany, was 22 and her mother, Mariot Dunbar of Mochrum, was 11510. She married Sir William Wallace 17th of Riccarton in 1529, in Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 12 January 1597, in Midlothian, Scotland, at the age of 84, and was buried in Of, Trabzon, Türkiye.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Sophia Kennedy est née le 11 janvier 1513, à Bargany, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Bargany, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Mariot Dunbar of Mochrum, avait 11510 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Wallace 17th of Riccarton en 1529, à Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 janvier 1597, à Midlothian, Écosse, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterrée à Of, Trabzon, Turquie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Sophia Kennedy am 11. Januar 1513 in Bargany, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Bargany 22 und ihre Mutter Mariot Dunbar of Mochrum 11510. Sie hat 1529 in Ayrshire, Scotland Sir William Wallace 17th of Riccarton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. Januar 1597 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Midlothian, Scotland und wurde in Of, Trabzon, Türkei begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Sophia Kennedy è nata il il 11 gennaio 1513 nel Bargany, Ayrshire, Scotland, sua padre, Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Bargany, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Mariot Dunbar of Mochrum, aveva 11510 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Wallace 17th of Riccarton nel 1529, nel Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 12 gennaio 1597, nel Midlothian, Scotland, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolta a Of, Trabzon, Turchia.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Sophia Kennedyが1513年1月11日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアバーガニーで生まれた時，父Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Barganyは22歳，母Mariot Dunbar of Mochrumは11510歳であった。1529年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアでSir William Wallace 17th of Riccartonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1597年1月12日にスコットランドミドロスアンで84歳で死去し，トルコトラブゾンオフにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Sophia Kennedy(이)가 1513년 1월 11일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 바건이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Bargany(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mariot Dunbar of Mochrum(은)는 11510세였다. 그녀는 1529년 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 Sir William Wallace 17th of Riccarton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1597년 1월 12일 스컷랜드 미들로스이언에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 튀르키예 트라브존 프에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Sophia Kennedy nasceu em 11 de janeiro de 1513, em Bargany, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Bargany, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Mariot Dunbar of Mochrum, tinha 11510 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Wallace 17th of Riccarton em 1529, em Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de janeiro de 1597, em Midlothian, Scotland, com 84 anos, e foi sepultada em Of, Trabzon, Turquia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Sophia Kennedy родилась 11 января 1513 г. в местности баргани, аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Bargany было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Mariot Dunbar of Mochrum, 11510. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Wallace 17th of Riccarton в 1529 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 12 января 1597 г. в местности мидлотян, Шотландия в возрасте 84 лет и была похоронена в местности оф, трабзон, Турция.
